faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Cypress Hills home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large black ants especially in spring. Carpenter ants are active at night and are attracted to moisture-damaged wood common in older Cypress Hills homes. If you spot winged ants indoors, you likely have an established colony that requires professional treatment.

faqs.question: What does carpenter ant control cost in Cypress Hills?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Cypress Hills typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of colonies present. Smaller treatments for early-stage infestations start at $350, while extensive infestations requiring multiple treatments and wall treatments can reach $2,000. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Will carpenter ants damage my Cypress Hills home?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants excavate wood to build their nests and can cause significant structural damage over time, especially to the wood-frame homes common in Cypress Hills. Unlike termites, they don't eat wood but hollow it out for nesting space. Early detection and professional treatment are essential to prevent costly repairs. Our treatment eliminates existing colonies and includes preventive measures to protect your home long-term.
